commons_file: File:Map of train-metro-tram of Algiers - January 2022 - fr.svg
why: Official EMA/AOTU maps are geographic overlays. Best Commons light-bg colored schematic covering Algiers Metro (blue) + SETRAM tram (green) + suburban rail (red). Rejected File:Algiers Metro.svg (transparent/dark presentation) and partial Line-1 strip diagram.

AMT official map is geographic street overlay. Best Commons single-line schematic; transparent SVG composited on white for light-bg. Shows all 8 operating stations (Brin–Brignole) matching geojson. Prefer Italian version over older German File:Metro Genova.svg (marks Brignole as under construction). Rejected OSM geographic Genova mappa metropolitana.

Prior blank note (cable car/bus only) is incorrect for our dataset: geojson is U-Bahn Serfaus / Dorfbahn (Q701311), 1 line / 4 stations (Parkplatz–Kirche–Zentrum–Seilbahn), audit passed. Best Commons light-bg schematic (transparent SVG on white). Not a bus map. Prefer Transitkaart over older Netzplan (Raika naming).
